calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Ernalyn Bura, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Petitioner: Shelly Jasmia Lache Berry, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Shelly Jasmia Lache Neal.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Reset To Feb-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Petitioner: Shelly Jasmia Lache Berry, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Petitioner was unable to provide the Court with the original Proof of Publication, matter is continued to Feb. 7, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
